2008.issue: [S2008] Version 3.4.1 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/username" attribute "label" uses key "SofarCloud username (email)" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

0065.issue: [S0065] No devDependency for "@types/node" found. Consider adding "@types/node":">=22" to devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ltspicer/ioBroker.sofarcloud/blob/master/package.json).
